message:
test(fcp-conformance/descriptor-status): pin combine worst-wins + From conversions (br-nrftm)

DescriptorStatus is the 11-variant enum used to roll up individual
descriptor checks into one status for downstream consumers (CLI,
admin UI, discovery responses). Two NORMATIVE properties drive the
design — combine() is a worst-wins fold over a documented severity
ranking, and the From<&ConnectorHealth> + From<&SelfCheckReport>
conversions are cross-crate contracts. Zero conformance coverage.

Adds 17 tests against the public fcp_core API:

- combine_with_self_is_idempotent (all 11 variants)
- combine_is_commutative_in_severity (full 11x11 matrix; reorder
  invariance lets aggregators fold without grouping concerns)
- combine_with_ready_is_identity (Ready is rank 0 / bottom)
- combine_with_failed_yields_failed (Failed is rank 10 / absorbing top)
- combine_is_associative (worst-wins is max over total order)
- combine_picks_more_severe_for_documented_pairs (10 adjacent rank
  pairs covering the full ordering Ready<Unknown<NotYetMeasured<
  Unsupported<Unverifiable<Degraded<Drifted<Missing<Unavailable<
  PolicyBlocked<Failed)
- 6× From<&ConnectorHealth> + From<&SelfCheckReport> mapping checks
  (Healthy->Ready, Degraded->Degraded, Unavailable->Unavailable —
  Unavailable is NOT Failed because the connector might recover;
  Ok/Degraded/Failed/Unsupported all map straight through)
- fold_over_descriptor_check_statuses_yields_worst (the aggregator
  pattern callers use)
- fold_over_all_variants_collapses_to_failed (lattice-top check)
- json_serde_uses_snake_case_variants ("policy_blocked" wire string)
- each_variant_has_a_distinct_rank_via_combine_self_neutrality

All 17 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
descriptor_status_combine_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
